text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In the cafeteria at lunchtime...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I see. So it's not just the products one uses that
make a difference, but also the way in which one
washes and dries their hair.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. How you dry it is especially important.
That has an enormous effect on your styling
options the next day.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I knew I could count on you for advice. Thanks so
much for letting me pick your brain.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide is busily chatting away with Gold
City, seemingly on the subject of hair care.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer! Hello.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's right. City here is a professional model. I
thought I might ask her for some hair care tips.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Personally, I don't really think you need to worry
about it so much.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Your hair is super beautiful. You have really nice
natural waves, and―

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: No, trust me, you don't understand.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My hair's only the way it is because I'm constantly
doing battle with it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If I neglect it for even one day, it ends up looking
like a raging dragon.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...A raging dragon, huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well, how about this? Let me help find you a
good stylist.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
A lot of places specialize in hair care now, so
there's bound to be a place that fits the bill for
you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You'll help me find a place? That would be
wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Okay, so, this place is one hundred percent
organic.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
They use really good treatment products. Plus, it's
close, which is super convenient.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. Yes, finding someplace close by would
certainly be a bonus.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Then there's this salon, which is really popular
right now. Their slogan is, "A brand new you,
starting with your scalp."

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: My! That's quite the lofty promise!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's supposed to be amazing. Scalp cleansing
changes your hair at a fundamental level, they
say!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Really, now? If you're saying it might actually
tame these unruly curls of mine, that is surely
something to consider!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh... Whoops.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What's the matter?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It looks like they moved. Out west, to Kansai...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Kansai's probably a little far for you, huh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, it could be worth it... If it's for a brand new
me...
choice_data_list:
You can't seriously be thinking about going to
Kansai!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Gah! I know, I know! I get it, okay?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But it's a brand new me we're talking about here!
Don't you think that would be worth the trip?
choice_data_list: I think a place nearby would suffice.

Well, maybe we can just go next time we're in
Kansai?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I suppose, logically speaking, that is a
reasonable assessment.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
B-but... I finally found someplace that might help
me, so try to understand.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I-I mean, there are other good salons with scalp
care too, you know! Much closer than Kansai.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Look. There's this one. And this one! These look
like they'd do the trick.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City and I expend considerable effort trying
to persuade Biwa Hayahide not to travel
cross-country for scalp care.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ah! I didn't even think of that! That's a great idea,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We can stop by next time we visit the Hanshin
Racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Wow. You serious?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Of course I'm serious! It's for a brand new me!
Starting with my scalp!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I can hardly wait. I'll beat everyone in the race,
and then I'll beat this raging dragon on my head
to boot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Biwa Hayahide gathers as much
information as she can about the salon and
Hanshin Racecourse, in preparation for the "big
day."
